channel.title: DevOps, Cloud & Systems Engineering Blog — Yousef Tamer (jooexploit)
channel.description: Technical guides, case studies, and tutorials on container orchestration, cloud-native pipelines, and systems automation.

item.title: Demystifying GitOps: Automating Kubernetes Deployments with ArgoCD
item.description: A comprehensive guide detailing GitOps architectures, ArgoCD sync loops, and structural setups to synchronize declarative repository states directly into HA Kubernetes clusters.

item.title: Provisioning Multi-Region AWS Networks Using Terraform State Locks
item.description: Exploring multi-account AWS architectures. Learn how to configure S3 state backends and DynamoDB lock tables to prevent deployment race conditions in automated pipelines.

item.title: Linux Kernel Tuning & Network Protocol Hardening for DevOps Engineers
item.description: A deep dive into sysctl configurations, network buffer tuning, TCP backlog queues, and firewall policies to harden Linux servers against DDoS floods.
